label: GI toxicity
description: Gastrointestinal toxicity including nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, colitis and bowel injury

label: GU toxicity
description: Genitourinary toxicity including cystitis, urethritis and urinary dysfunction

label: Mucositis / oesophagitis
description: Mucosal inflammation of the oral cavity, pharynx, larynx and oesophagus

label: Dermatitis / skin toxicity
description: Radiation dermatitis, rash and skin breakdown including radiation recall phenomena

label: Pneumonitis
description: Radiation pneumonitis and drug-related interstitial lung disease/pneumonitis

label: Marrow suppression / cytopenias
description: Haematologic toxicity including neutropenia, thrombocytopenia and anaemia

label: Bleeding
description: Haemorrhage or bleeding complications including vascular injury

label: Fistula / perforation
description: Abnormal connections or perforations involving hollow viscera

label: Wound-healing complication
description: Impaired wound healing, tissue breakdown and postoperative complications

label: CNS oedema / radionecrosis
description: Cerebral oedema, radionecrosis, leukoencephalopathy and neurocognitive injury

label: Cardiac toxicity
description: Cardiotoxicity including cardiomyopathy, coronary artery disease and arrhythmia

label: Renal toxicity
description: Nephrotoxicity and renal dysfunction

label: Hepatic toxicity
description: Hepatotoxicity and radiation-induced liver disease

label: Neuropathy / plexopathy
description: Peripheral neuropathy, brachial plexopathy and cauda equina injury

label: Lymphoedema
description: Lymphatic obstruction and chronic limb or regional swelling

label: Osteonecrosis / ORN / bone-healing
description: Osteoradionecrosis, medication-related osteonecrosis of the jaw and bone repair impairment

label: Swallowing / nutritional toxicity
description: Dysphagia, aspiration and nutrition-related complications

label: Sexual / fertility toxicity
description: Sexual dysfunction, gonadal failure and fertility impairment

label: Radiation recall
description: Radiation recall reaction in a previously irradiated field triggered by systemic therapy

label: Other relevant site-specific toxicity
description: Site-specific toxicity domains not captured by the above categories
